name: worldcup2026-predictor
description: 2026 FIFA World Cup Predictor — Dixon-Coles Poisson model with Polymarket integration

scripts.test: python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('server.py').read()); print('✓ server.py syntax OK'); import http.server, json, socketserver; print('✓ stdlib imports OK')" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['data/teams.js','data/matches.js','model/stats.js','model/elo.js','model/dixon-coles.js','model/gbdt.js','model/monte-carlo.js','mc-worker.js'];files.forEach(f=>{try{new Function(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));console.log('✓',f)}catch(e){console.error('✗',f,e.message);process.exit(1)}});console.log('✓ All JS modules syntax OK')"

author: roywongx
